scripts.build:bridge: npm run build -w @figma-auto/protocol && npm run build -w @figma-auto/mcp-bridge
scripts.build: npm run build -w @figma-auto/protocol && npm run build -w @figma-auto/mcp-bridge && npm run build -w @figma-auto/figma-plugin
scripts.test: npm run test -w @figma-auto/protocol && npm run test -w @figma-auto/mcp-bridge
